name: Crunchy Granola#2
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 275°F.
Spray 2 baking sheets with nonstick cooking spray, making sure to coat the edges.
In a large mixing bowl, combine all dry ingredients except raisins.
In a small bowl, mix honey, canola oil, and vanilla.
Pour the honey mixture over the dry ingredients and stir well until evenly coated.
Spread the mixture evenly on both baking sheets.
Bake for 35-45 minutes, stirring once after 20 minutes, or until the granola is browned.
Remove the granola from the pans and let it cool slightly.
Add raisins to the cooled granola.
Store in an airtight container.
Serving Size: 1/3 cup
Serves: 16
